RefundPolicy.metaDescription: WebAriadne customer refund policy — eligibility, timelines, fresh product claims, and how to request a refund or replacement.
RefundPolicy.title: Customer refund policy
RefundPolicy.subtitle: This policy explains when and how we issue refunds, replacements, or store credit for orders placed on WebAriadne.
RefundPolicy.helpDesc: Contact our support team with your order number and photos where applicable.

overview.title: Overview
overview.body: We want you to receive fresh, correct groceries every time. If something goes wrong with your order, we will work with you to resolve it fairly and quickly. This policy applies to purchases made through webariadne.com and our customer support channels.

eligibility.title: When you may receive a refund
eligibility.body: You may be eligible for a full or partial refund, replacement delivery, or store credit when any of the following apply:
list: An item was missing, damaged, spoiled, or past its use-by date on delivery
You received the wrong product, size, or quantity
A substituted item was not approved and the replacement is unsuitable
Your order was cancelled by us or could not be delivered through no fault of yours
A duplicate charge or billing error occurred

freshProducts.title: Fresh, chilled & frozen products
freshProducts.body: Because of their nature, fresh and temperature-sensitive goods have additional requirements:
list: Report issues within 24 hours of delivery with your order number and clear photos
Keep products refrigerated until our team reviews your claim where safe to do so
We may offer a replacement in your next delivery slot or a refund to your original payment method
Opened fresh items are only refunded when quality or safety clearly failed on arrival

nonPerishable.title: Shelf-stable & unopened goods
nonPerishable.body: For packaged, non-perishable products in resaleable condition:
list: Returns may be accepted within 14 days of delivery with proof of purchase
Items must be unopened, undamaged, and in original packaging
Delivery charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error
Refunds are processed after we receive and inspect the returned goods

damagedItems.title: Damaged or incorrect items
damagedItems.body: If your delivery arrives damaged or does not match what you ordered, do not dispose of affected items until we advise you — photos help us improve packing and supplier quality. We may request that you keep or return specific items depending on food-safety rules.

substitutions.title: Substitutions & out-of-stock items
substitutions.body: If you allowed substitutions at checkout, we may replace unavailable items with products of equal or better quality at the same or lower price. If you declined substitutions, missing items are refunded automatically after delivery. If a substitution is unsuitable, contact us within 24 hours.

cancellations.title: Cancellations before delivery
cancellations.body: You may cancel free of charge before your order is prepared for dispatch. Once picking has started or the order is out for delivery, cancellation may not be possible; refused delivery may be subject to a restocking fee except where required by law or where the fault is ours.

refundMethods.title: How refunds are paid
refundMethods.body: Approved refunds are issued using one of the following methods:
list: Original payment method (card, wallet, or other method used at checkout)
Store credit or voucher for a future order, if you prefer or where card refunds are not possible
Replacement items in a subsequent delivery, by agreement with our support team

timelines.title: Processing times
timelines.body: We aim to respond to refund requests within two business days. Once approved, card refunds typically appear within 5–10 business days depending on your bank. Store credit is applied to your account as soon as the claim is closed.

exclusions.title: What is not covered
exclusions.body: Refunds are generally not provided when:
list: Issues are reported outside the time limits in this policy
Products were stored incorrectly after delivery (e.g. left unrefrigerated)
Minor cosmetic imperfections that do not affect safety or intended use
Promotional or clearance items marked as final sale, unless defective on arrival
Problems caused by an incorrect delivery address or unavailable recipient

howToClaim.title: How to request a refund
howToClaim.body: To start a claim, please have your order number ready and contact us through one of these channels:
list: Use the Contact page on our website
Email hello@webariadne.com with photos and a short description
Call our support line listed in the header during business hours
Reference Order Tracking if you need status updates while we investigate

Terms.metaDescription: WebAriadne terms and conditions — using our online grocery store, placing orders, payments, delivery, and your legal rights.
Terms.title: Terms & conditions
Terms.subtitle: These terms govern your use of webariadne.com and purchases from WebAriadne. Please read them before placing an order.
Terms.helpDesc: Questions about these terms or your order?

overview.title: Overview
overview.body: WebAriadne operates an online grocery and household essentials store. By browsing our website, creating an account, or placing an order, you agree to these Terms & Conditions together with any policies referenced here (including our refund policy and privacy policy).

acceptance.title: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.body: If you do not agree with these terms, do not use our services. We may update these terms from time to time; the version in effect when you place an order applies to that transaction. Continued use after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised terms where permitted by law.

account.title: Your account
account.body: When you register, you agree to:
list: Provide accurate, current contact and delivery information
Keep your password confidential and notify us of suspected unauthorised access
Be at least 18 years old or have permission from a parent or guardian
Use one account per household unless we approve otherwise
Accept that we may suspend or close accounts used for fraud, abuse, or breach of these terms

orders.title: Orders & contract formation
orders.body: Placing an order is an offer to buy. A contract is formed when we confirm acceptance (e.g. order confirmation email). We may refuse or cancel orders because of stock limits, pricing errors, delivery restrictions, suspected fraud, or legal requirements. Order details, including substitutions preferences, are shown at checkout.

pricing.title: Prices, promotions & errors
pricing.body: Prices and offers are shown in the currency selected at checkout and include applicable taxes where stated. We strive for accuracy but may correct obvious errors before or after acceptance. Promotional codes are subject to stated conditions and cannot be combined unless we allow it.

payment.title: Payment
payment.body: You authorise us to charge your chosen payment method for the order total, including delivery fees and applicable taxes. We use secure payment processors; we do not store full card details on our servers. Failed or reversed payments may result in cancellation or suspension of delivery.

delivery.title: Delivery & risk
delivery.body: Delivery windows, fees, and minimum order values are shown at checkout and may vary by area. You must provide safe access for our courier. Risk in goods passes to you on delivery to your address or collection point. Temperature-sensitive items should be stored promptly; we are not responsible for spoilage caused by delayed unpacking after a successful delivery.

returns.title: Returns & refunds
returns.body: Your statutory rights are not affected. Product-specific return and refund rules are set out in our Customer refund policy, including time limits for fresh goods and procedures for damaged or missing items.

conduct.title: Acceptable use
list: Use the site for unlawful purposes or to harm others
Attempt to interfere with security, scrape content at scale, or overload our systems
Resell products purchased for personal consumption without our written consent
Submit false claims, reviews, or chargebacks
Harass our staff, couriers, or other customers

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: All content on webariadne.com — including text, logos, images, and software — is owned by WebAriadne or its licensors and protected by copyright and trademark laws. You may view and print pages for personal shopping only. Commercial reproduction or redistribution without permission is prohibited.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law:
list: Our services are provided on an "as is" basis; we do not guarantee uninterrupted access
We are not liable for indirect or consequential loss (e.g. lost profits) arising from use of the site
Our total liability for any order is limited to the amount you paid for that order
Nothing in these terms excludes liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, fraud, or other rights that cannot be limited by law

privacy.title: Privacy & data
privacy.body: We process personal data to fulfil orders, provide support, and improve our services in line with applicable data protection law. Our privacy policy describes what we collect, how we use it, cookies, retention, and your rights in detail. For requests about your data, contact us using the details below.

changes.title: Changes to services
changes.body: We may modify product ranges, delivery areas, fees, or website features without notice. If a change materially affects an order you already paid for, we will contact you with options such as a refund or alternative delivery.

governingLaw.title: Governing law & disputes
governingLaw.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Slovak Republic unless mandatory consumer protection rules in your country require otherwise. Disputes should first be raised with our support team. Consumers in the EU may also use online dispute resolution platforms made available by their member state.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For questions about these terms, billing, or your account, reach us via the Contact page, at hello@webariadne.com, or through the support channels listed in the site header.

Privacy.metaDescription: WebAriadne privacy policy — how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data when you shop on webariadne.com.
Privacy.title: Privacy policy
Privacy.subtitle: This policy explains how WebAriadne handles your personal data when you use webariadne.com, create an account, or place an order.
Privacy.helpDesc: Questions about your data or this policy?

overview.title: Overview
overview.body: We respect your privacy and process personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Slovak law. This policy applies to visitors, registered customers, and anyone who contacts us through our website or support channels.

controller.title: Who is responsible
controller.body: The data controller is WebAriadne, Hlavná 123, 811 01 Bratislava, Slovakia. For privacy-related requests, email hello@webariadne.com or use the Contact page. We have not appointed a data protection officer; general enquiries can be sent to the same address.

dataWeCollect.title: Data we collect
dataWeCollect.body: Depending on how you use our store, we may process:
list: Identity and contact details (name, email, phone, delivery address)
Account credentials and preferences (login, wishlist, substitution choices)
Order and payment information (items purchased, amounts, transaction references — we do not store full card numbers)
Delivery and communication records (courier notes, support tickets, emails)
Technical data (IP address, browser type, device identifiers, pages viewed)
Marketing preferences and, where you opt in, newsletter subscription data
Reviews, ratings, or other content you submit voluntarily

howWeUse.title: How we use your data
list: Create and manage your account and process orders
Deliver products, send order updates, and handle returns or refunds
Take payment and prevent fraud
Provide customer support and respond to enquiries
Improve our website, product range, and delivery experience
Send service messages (e.g. order confirmations) and, with consent, marketing
Comply with legal, tax, and accounting obligations
Establish, exercise, or defend legal claims where necessary

legalBasis.title: Legal bases
legalBasis.body: Under GDPR we rely on one or more of the following, depending on the activity:
list: Contract — to fulfil your order and provide account services
Legitimate interests — to improve our store, secure our systems, and prevent abuse (balanced against your rights)
Legal obligation — for tax, accounting, and regulatory requirements
Consent — for optional cookies, marketing emails, or other choices where required

cookies.title: Cookies & similar technologies
cookies.body: Our site uses cookies and similar tools to:
list: Keep you signed in and remember your basket or locale preferences
Measure traffic and understand how pages are used
Support security and fraud prevention
Deliver relevant offers where you have agreed to marketing cookies

sharing.title: Who we share data with
sharing.body: We do not sell your personal data. We share it only when needed to run our business:
list: Payment processors to authorise and settle transactions
Delivery partners and couriers to fulfil orders
IT, hosting, email, and analytics providers under contract
Professional advisers (e.g. accountants or lawyers) when required
Public authorities if the law requires us to do so

retention.title: How long we keep data
retention.body: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes above. Order and billing records are typically kept for the period required by Slovak tax and commercial law (generally up to 10 years). Account data is kept while your account is active and for a reasonable period afterwards. Marketing data is kept until you unsubscribe or withdraw consent. Technical logs may be kept for shorter periods for security and troubleshooting.

security.title: Security
security.body: We use appropriate technical and organisational measures — including encryption in transit, access controls, and secure payment processing — to protect your data. No online service is completely secure; please use a strong password and contact us promptly if you suspect unauthorised access to your account.

yourRights.title: Your rights
yourRights.body: If you are in the EEA or UK, you may have the right to:
list: Access a copy of the personal data we hold about you
Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
Request erasure in certain circumstances
Restrict or object to processing in certain circumstances
Receive your data in a portable format where applicable
Withdraw consent at any time for processing based on consent
Lodge a complaint with the Slovak Office for Personal Data Protection (Úrad na ochranu osobných údajov SR) or your local supervisory authority

internationalTransfers.title: International transfers
internationalTransfers.body: Your data is primarily processed within the European Economic Area. If a service provider processes data outside the EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards such as EU Standard Contractual Clauses or an adequacy decision apply before the transfer.

children.title: Children
children.body: Our services are not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe a child has provided us with data, contact us and we will delete it where required.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top shows when it was revised. Material changes will be highlighted on the website where appropriate. Continued use after changes are posted means you acknowledge the updated policy where permitted by law.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy requests, questions about this policy, or to exercise your rights, contact us via the Contact page, at hello@webariadne.com, or through the support channels listed in the site header. We aim to respond within one month as required by GDPR.

FAQ.metaDescription: Answers to common questions about orders, delivery, products, payments, and your WebAriadne account.
FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subtitle: Quick answers about shopping, delivery, and your account. Can't find what you need? Contact our team.
FAQ.contactHint: Our support team is happy to help with orders, products, or account issues.

trackOrder.question: How do I track my order?
trackOrder.answer: After checkout you receive a confirmation email with your order number. Visit Order Tracking in the header menu and enter your order number and email to see the current status. This demo storefront shows sample tracking steps only.

modifyOrder.question: Can I change my order after placing it?
modifyOrder.answer: If your order has not yet been packed, contact us as soon as possible and we will try to update items or delivery details. Once picking has started, changes may no longer be possible.

cancelOrder.question: How do I cancel an order?
cancelOrder.answer: Open Order Tracking or contact support with your order number. Cancellations are free before the order enters delivery. After dispatch, you may refuse delivery or request a return according to our return policy.

orderConfirmation.question: I did not receive an order confirmation email.
orderConfirmation.answer: Check your spam folder and verify the email address entered at checkout. You can also sign in to My Account to view recent orders. If you still cannot find it, contact us with your name and delivery address.

deliveryAreas.question: Which areas do you deliver to?
deliveryAreas.answer: We deliver to selected cities shown in the Delivery city picker in the header. Enter your city to see available slots. We are expanding coverage regularly — contact us if your area is not listed yet.

deliveryTimes.question: What delivery time slots are available?
deliveryTimes.answer: At checkout you can choose a same-day or next-day window where available. Slots fill up quickly on weekends and holidays, so we recommend booking early. Exact times are confirmed in your order summary.

deliveryFees.question: Is delivery free?
deliveryFees.answer: Standard delivery is free above the minimum order value shown in the top bar promotion. Smaller orders may include a flat delivery fee calculated at checkout before you pay.

missedDelivery.question: What happens if I miss my delivery?
missedDelivery.answer: The courier will leave a notice and may attempt redelivery or hold chilled items according to local rules. Contact support the same day so we can reschedule or arrange collection from a pickup point.

organicProducts.question: How are organic products labelled?
organicProducts.answer: Products certified or marketed as organic display a green organic badge on the product image and detail page. Filter by category or search for organic items in Fresh Produce and Pantry sections.

freshness.question: How do you keep fruit and vegetables fresh?
freshness.answer: Perishable items are picked close to your delivery slot and transported in temperature-controlled vans. We prioritize local suppliers where possible and rotate stock daily to reduce waste.

outOfStock.question: An item shows as out of stock — will it return?
outOfStock.answer: Out-of-stock products cannot be added to the cart. Many seasonal items return within days. Add the product to your wishlist to check back easily, or browse similar products suggested on the product page.

substitutions.question: Can I allow substitutions for missing items?
substitutions.answer: During checkout you can opt in to allow replacements of equal or better quality at the same or lower price. If you decline substitutions, missing items are refunded after delivery.

createAccount.question: Do I need an account to shop?
createAccount.answer: You can browse and add items to the cart without signing in, but an account saves your addresses, order history, wishlist, and vouchers. Registration takes less than a minute with email and password.

paymentMethods.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: This demo checkout accepts major card brands shown at payment step. In production, we also support digital wallets and bank transfer where available in your region.

vouchers.question: How do I use a voucher or promo code?
vouchers.answer: Open My Voucher in the account menu to see active codes, or enter a code at checkout in the voucher field. Each code has its own minimum spend, expiry date, and product restrictions.

returns.question: What is your return policy?
returns.answer: Unopened non-perishable goods can be returned within 14 days with proof of purchase. Fresh and chilled products are refunded only if damaged, incorrect, or past their use-by date on delivery — contact us with photos within 24 hours.

About.metaDescription: Learn about WebAriadne — our story, values, and commitment to fresh groceries delivered with care.
About.title: About us
About.heroSubtitle: WebAriadne connects local producers and trusted brands with households who care about quality, value, and sustainability.
About.storyTitle: From neighbourhood market to your doorstep
About.storyP1: WebAriadne started with a simple idea: grocery shopping should feel personal, transparent, and convenient. We built an online store that celebrates seasonal produce, honest labels, and fair prices.
About.storyP2: Today we work with farmers, bakeries, and specialty suppliers across Slovakia — curating a catalog you can trust, whether you are stocking the pantry or planning a week of family meals.
About.valuesSubtitle: Every product on our shelves reflects the standards we hold ourselves to.
About.valueQualityDesc: We vet suppliers, check freshness, and stand behind every item we sell.
About.valueFreshDesc: We prioritise in-season produce and short supply chains wherever possible.
About.valueCommunityDesc: We support local growers and give back through food-bank partnerships.
About.missionTitle: Making good food accessible to everyone
About.missionDesc: Whether you shop weekly or need a last-minute top-up, our team is here to help — online, in store, and through our blog with recipes and tips.

About2.metaDescription: Discover how WebAriadne sources, picks, and delivers fresh groceries — our team, process, and promises.
About2.title: About us
About2.heroSubtitle: We are a Slovak marketplace built around short supply chains, honest sourcing, and delivery you can plan around — from weekly shops to same-day top-ups.
About2.highlightsSubtitle: Four principles guide every category we list and every box we pack.
About2.highlightOrganicDesc: Organic lines are marked on-shelf and online so you always know what you are buying.
About2.highlightLocalDesc: We prioritise Slovak and regional producers for produce, dairy, and bakery.
About2.highlightWasteDesc: Right-sized portions and chilled chain discipline help cut spoilage before it reaches your kitchen.
About2.highlightSpeedDesc: Choose slots that fit your week — with tracking from pick to doorstep.
About2.processDesc: Every order follows the same careful path so freshness and food safety stay predictable.
About2.stepSourceDesc: We onboard vendors against quality, labelling, and fulfilment standards before they list a single SKU.
About2.stepPickDesc: Orders are picked in temperature-aware zones and checked before they leave our hub.
About2.stepDeliverDesc: Couriers follow optimised routes; you get updates until the order is at your door.
About2.quote: Good food should not be a luxury — it should be dependable, affordable, and close to home.
About2.promise1: Transparent pricing on every product page
About2.promise2: Responsive support for orders and refunds
About2.promise3: Seasonal inspiration on our blog and newsletters
About2.ctaDesc: Browse thousands of staples and specialties, or reach out if you are a producer interested in joining the marketplace.

Vendors.metaDescription: Browse trusted marketplace vendors selling fresh groceries, coffee, tea, bakery, and pet supplies.
Vendors.title: Our vendors
Vendors.subtitle: Discover the sellers behind our catalog — from local producers to specialty brands.
Vendors.demoHint: Demo marketplace vendors — product counts reflect the mock catalog.
Vendors.noProducts: No products listed for this vendor yet.

ariadne-foods.description: Ariadne Foods is our flagship fresh and pantry partner, supplying produce, grains, and daily staples with a focus on traceability and fair pricing.

ariadne-roasters.description: Ariadne Roasters sources beans from sustainable farms and roasts in small batches for balanced, aromatic cups at home.

ariadne-teas.description: From everyday green tea to fragrant jasmine blends, Ariadne Teas curates leaves packed for freshness and clarity of flavour.

ariadne-pets.description: Ariadne Pets offers balanced dry food, treats, and wet meals formulated with named proteins and transparent ingredient lists.

starbucks.description: Starbucks brings café favourites to your kitchen with whole-bean and ground coffees roasted to their signature profiles.

stouffer.description: Stouffer supplies trusted dairy and chilled products for breakfasts, baking, and quick family meals.

wonder.description: Wonder delivers soft, versatile breads ideal for sandwiches, toast, and everyday baking needs.

categoryDescriptions.recipes: Seasonal dishes, meal ideas, and kitchen inspiration from our grocery experts.
categoryDescriptions.tips: Practical shopping and cooking advice to save time and eat well.
categoryDescriptions.nutrition: Balanced eating guides for you and your household, including pets.
categoryDescriptions.sustainability: Smarter choices that reduce waste and support a greener pantry.

tagDescriptions.seasonal: Articles about eating with the seasons and shopping what's fresh now.

ariadne-team.name: Ariadne Team
ariadne-team.bio: Recipes, guides, and store news from the WebAriadne editorial desk.

martina-k.name: Martina K.
martina-k.bio: Martina writes about budget-friendly staples and organic pantry swaps.

tomas-v.name: Tomáš V.
tomas-v.bio: Tomáš covers coffee, tea, and small rituals that make mornings better.

lucia-h.name: Lucia H.
lucia-h.bio: Lucia shares practical batch-cooking plans for busy households.

seasonal-spring-produce.title: 5 spring vegetables to add to your cart this week
seasonal-spring-produce.excerpt: Bright, tender produce is back at the market — here is what to grab first and how to use it.
seasonal-spring-produce.content:
Spring is the easiest season to eat more vegetables. Crowns of broccoli, sweet cherry tomatoes, and crisp greens arrive with peak flavor and fair prices.

Start with one pan-roasted tray: toss broccoli and carrots with olive oil, salt, and lemon. Serve over grains or alongside grilled fish.

Shopping tip: choose firm stalks and deep green heads. Store produce unwashed in the crisper and rinse just before cooking to keep leaves crisp longer.

organic-pantry-essentials.title: Building an organic pantry on a budget
organic-pantry-essentials.excerpt: Stock versatile staples that stretch meals without stretching your grocery bill.
organic-pantry-essentials.content:
A smart pantry starts with grains, legumes, and spices you reach for every week. Organic quinoa, rice blends, and whole-grain pasta anchor quick dinners.

Buy larger bags of staples you use often and refill jars at home — it cuts packaging waste and per-serving cost.

Pair pantry bases with fresh market produce: a scoop of grains plus roasted vegetables becomes lunch in minutes.

coffee-at-home.title: Better coffee at home: grind, water, and timing
coffee-at-home.excerpt: Small changes to your routine can rival your favorite café cup.
coffee-at-home.content:
Freshly ground beans make the biggest difference. Grind right before brewing and match grind size to your method — finer for espresso, coarser for French press.

Use filtered water just off the boil and measure coffee by weight when you can. A simple scale keeps flavor consistent cup after cup.

Store beans in a cool, dark place in an airtight container. Avoid the freezer unless you are dividing bulk buys into single-use portions.

pet-food-guide.title: How to choose quality food for dogs and cats
pet-food-guide.excerpt: Labels can be confusing — focus on protein, portions, and your pet's life stage.
pet-food-guide.content:
Look for named protein sources first on the ingredient list and formulas matched to age, size, and activity level.

Wet food can support hydration; dry kibble is convenient for portion control. Many households combine both with guidance from their vet.

Transition slowly over seven to ten days when switching brands to avoid upset stomachs. Watch coat quality, energy, and appetite as signals.

meal-prep-basics.title: Meal prep basics for busy weekdays
meal-prep-basics.excerpt: One hour on Sunday can save you from weekday takeout — here is a simple plan.
meal-prep-basics.content:
Pick two proteins, two grains, and three vegetables you already enjoy. Roast trays together while rice or quinoa simmers on the stove.

Store components separately so textures stay fresh. Combine at lunch with a drizzle of dressing or sauce.

Cherry tomatoes, pre-washed greens, and hard-boiled eggs are fast finishers that make bowls feel complete without extra cooking.

reduce-food-waste.title: Simple ways to reduce food waste at home
reduce-food-waste.excerpt: Plan portions, store smarter, and use leftovers before they turn — small habits add up.
reduce-food-waste.content:
Shop with meals in mind instead of filling the cart. A short list tied to recipes prevents impulse buys that spoil first.

Move older items to the front of the fridge and label containers with dates. Citrus, apples, and root vegetables last longer in cool, dry storage.

Freeze bread ends for croutons, simmer vegetable scraps into stock, and turn ripe fruit into smoothies or compote before it softens.
